name: New Year's Paella
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the stock to a boil, add saffron, and simmer for 10 minutes before setting aside.
2. Heat olive oil in a large paella pan or other large pan.
3. Add garlic and sauté until it begins to color.
4. Add onions and sauté until softened.
5. Add peppers and cook slightly; remove vegetables from the pan and set aside.
6. Add chicken and brown, then remove from the pan.
7. Add sausage chunks and brown, then remove from the pan.
8. Add squid and toss briefly.
9. Stir in rice, tomatoes, stock, salt, sausage, chicken, reserved vegetables, peas, olives, and parsley (reserve some for garnish).
10. Cover and bring to a boil; remove cover and arrange rockfish pieces on top.
11. Replace the cover and cook for about 5 more minutes.
12. Uncover and add mussels; cover and cook for another 5 minutes.
13. Add peeled, deveined large shrimp; continue cooking until mussels open, shrimp are cooked, and rice is tender.
14. If the rice appears too dry, add more stock or water at any point.
15. Serve after standing covered for about 5 minutes before sprinkling with remaining parsley. Place the pan on a pad in the center of the table and remove the lid with a flourish!
